label: Transparent yarrow cluster motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Yarrow transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete yarrow flower cluster isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: Cream-white yarrow flower cluster with sage-green foliage, prairie ochre hints, crisp botanical texture, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, no shadows, gradients, texture, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no Queen Anne's lace confusion, no vase, no hand, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Yarrow light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn board named Morphous Yarrow, derived from cream yarrow clusters, sage green foliage, and prairie ochre.
Required visible sections: palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and asset examples.
Style: medicinal operations system with records, intake forms, tables, calm cards, sage controls, and 8px radii.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Yarrow dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode translation with herb-shadow surfaces, cream foregrounds, sage controls, ochre focus, and medicinal operations coverage.
